1.title: Domain Model & Config
1.instruction: Document entities (user, membership, station, dock, bike, trip, pricing rule, incident) and required configs (service areas, operating hours) in `docs/bike_share_domain.md`.

2.title: Station Inventory Service
2.instruction: Implement a service that tracks stations, docks, bikes, and statuses. Expose CRUD for stations and a feed for real-time counts/availability.

3.title: Bike Availability & Reservation Rules
3.instruction: Add logic to calculate available bikes per station and optional short-hold reservations pre-unlock. Include timeouts and cancellation rules.

4.title: Trip Lifecycle Service
4.instruction: Create APIs to start, pause, resume, and end rides. Capture telemetry (location, battery) and enforce time limits/grace periods.

5.title: Pricing & Fees Engine
5.instruction: Implement pricing calculation for memberships vs pay-per-ride, deposits, overages, and penalties for late returns or out-of-zone drops.

6.title: Payment & Billing Pipeline
6.instruction: Integrate with a payment provider for deposit holds, ride authorization, final capture, and refunds. Log payment events for audit.

7.title: Notifications & Receipts
7.instruction: Emit notifications for ride start/stop, nearing overage, penalties, and payment receipts. Support email/SMS push via a queue or webhooks.

8.title: Operations & Incident Management
8.instruction: Add endpoints to log incidents (damaged bike, failed dock, safety issue), track SLA, and surface rebalancing cues for ops dashboards.
